summary: Merged USA (CWCus) and Russia (CWCru) into one CWC playbook. Fixed pervasive data corruption: USA best_vs fields were almost all wrongly "aircraft" (corrected per role/notes — e.g. M60A3/M1A1 are anti-armor, not anti-air); Russia best_vs/weak_vs used raw armor-class IDs (translated to human roles) and tanks were mislabeled light_at (reclassified as mbt). Counter doctrine kept intact: ARMOR_PIERCING vs tanks (0.9x), STEALTHJET/COMANCHE_VULCAN and ATGM-TOW burst (20x) vs air, EXPLOSION (Su25/MLRS) vs infantry/structures, Cruise Missile UNRESISTABLE as the only reliable answer to hard fortifications. Coverage gaps remain on USA M113/M163 plain variants and all Fort/garrison templates — the bot is blind to those in effectiveness data.

factions.opening_notes: USA (CWCus) is a diversified vehicle-spam + air-dominance faction, heavily science/rank-gated. Open Barracks first for anti-rush infantry (InfAntiAir + InfTOWMan cover air/armor cheaply), then rush War Factory for M113/M163 (transport + Vulcan AA). Research Rank1 immediately — it gates almost the entire vehicle tree. Mid game: M2A1 IFV + M60A3, then M1A1 (or NATO Leo2A4 which needs NO science — strong shortcut to a top-tier MBT). Core mid-late army is M1A1 + M109 artillery. Air arm: F16 early (Rank2, but it's an AA fighter with near-zero ground DPS), F4G for SEAD, A10 as the tank/heli killer, Apache (AH64) for longest-range heli. TOW-armed units (InfTOWMan 2000 DPS, M998_TOW, M2A1) hard-counter helicopters. Cruise Missile (5000) is a one-shot superweapon (UNRESISTABLE).

build_order: Build workers/scouts for economy and map control
Build CWCusBarracks (500) for early infantry defense vs rushes (InfAntiAir + InfTOWMan cover air/armor cheaply)
Research SCIENCE_CWCusRank1 immediately — gates nearly the whole vehicle tree
Build CWCusWarFactory (1000), spam M113 transports + M163 Vulcan AA
Research SCIENCE_CWCusRank2 to open the Air Field tree; build CWCusAirField (1000) for F-16 air cover
Research SCIENCE_CWCusM1A1 for the M1A1 main tank (or build Leo2A4 — no science required)
Build CWCusHelipad (1000); unlock AH-6 for anti-infantry pressure
Research SCIENCE_CWCusRank3 for M109 artillery + F-15 air superiority; M1A1 + M109 is the core army
Build SmallFuelDepot (3000) to scale economy for unit spam
Research Rank4-tier sciences for elite units: AH-64 Apache, A-10, F-111 bombers, F4G SEAD

factions.opening_notes: Russia (CWCru) is an armored doctrine: heavy tanks, mobile APCs, and the strongest layered air defense in the mod (Shilka -> SA-9 -> SA-11 -> S-300). Open Barracks (no-tech infantry core: assault, AT, engineer), then War Factory. Research Rank1 to unlock the T-72 (800c, 188 DPS) — mass it as the cheap reliable core. Note BMD-1 (800c) and S-300 (1500c, no science) need no extra tech — strong free options. Tech Rank2 for Spetsnaz, Rank3 for Su-25 CAS + MiG-29 + 2S1 artillery. Transition to T-80U (1600c, 250 DPS, no science) / T-80UK flagship in late game and Su-27 for air superiority. Keep SA-11/S-300 AA umbrella up at all times — Russia's whole game plan assumes air denial.

build_order: Build Barracks (1500) as starting production — infantry core needs no tech
Build War Factory (2000) immediately after for tanks + AA vehicles
Research SCIENCE_CWCruRank1 early to unlock T-72 and Shilka SPAA
Mass-produce T-72 (800c, no further tech) as the strong cheap core; add Shilka (700c) for air defense
Secure economy with engineers + assault squads, build a fuel depot
Research SCIENCE_CWCruRank2 for Spetsnaz elite infantry
Build Air Field (3000) once economy supports it; add Mi-8 for mobility/fire support
Research SCIENCE_CWCruRank3 for Su-25 CAS, MiG-29, and 2S1 artillery
Transition to T-80U (no science) or T-80UK flagship tanks for late-game armor
Build Su-27 (3400) for air superiority; keep SA-11/S-300 AA umbrella up at all times

key_matchups.threat: MBT / heavy tank (T72, T80U/UK, M1A1, Leo2A4)
key_matchups.counter_with: AP-armed MBT (T80UK/M1A1, ~1000 DPS @ 534m) or ATGM-TOW infantry (InfTOWMan, 90 DPS @ 494m)
key_matchups.why: ARMOR_PIERCING gets only 0.9x on tank armor, so tank-vs-tank is an even mirror decided by range/DPS — the longer-ranged AP variant wins. ATGM-TOW infantry trade up cost-effectively and outrange short MBTs, but larger AP tanks outrange the TOW infantry.

key_matchups.counter_with: AP main-gun MBT (T80UK/M1A1) or indirect artillery (MLRS, 2S1, Su25)
key_matchups.why: IFV carries medium armor; AP rounds penetrate. Indirect arty hits from outside the IFV's anti-armor range. Direct duel favors the heavier mobile tank.

key_matchups.threat: AA vehicle (Shilka, SA-11, M163) and AA-gun tank chassis
key_matchups.counter_with: ATGM-TOW infantry (2000 DPS, 20x vs air-type armor), STEALTHJET_MISSILES helis/jets (10x), or Su25 EXPLOSION (2x area)
key_matchups.why: AA platforms optimize armor for air defense and are exposed to anti-air multipliers. AP rounds are NOT optimal here (only 0.9x). Use 20x ATGM burst, 10x stealth missiles, or explosive area attacks.

key_matchups.threat: Fighter / CAS aircraft (Su25, A10, F16, F15, MiG29, Su27)
key_matchups.counter_with: STEALTHJET_MISSILES (10x on F-series, 5x on Su25), dedicated AA fighters (F15/MiG29/Su27), COMANCHE_VULCAN AA guns (Shilka/M163), or Cruise Missile (UNRESISTABLE)
key_matchups.why: Fighter armor takes 5x-10x from STEALTHJET_MISSILES; COMANCHE_VULCAN gets 2x on fighter armor (0.3x on tanks). Fighter-vs-fighter is a missile duel. Cruise missile one-cycles anything.

key_matchups.counter_with: ATGM-TOW infantry (2000 DPS burst, 20x), STEALTHJET_MISSILES (10x on heli armor), COMANCHE_VULCAN AA (3.1x vs Mi24)
key_matchups.why: Heli armor is highly vulnerable: TOW infantry burst 2000 DPS @ 494m at 20x, stealth missiles 10x, Vulcan AA 3.1x. Keep a dedicated AA escort with any ground push.

key_matchups.counter_with: Su25 / A10 area strikes (2x EXPLOSION), artillery (MLRS, 2S1, M109), COMANCHE_VULCAN AA guns (2x on infantry)
key_matchups.why: Infantry armor takes 2x from CRUSH and COMANCHE_VULCAN, 1x from EXPLOSION over large AOE. Air strikes and carpet artillery shred clusters; Vulcan MGs are 2x anti-infantry but only 0.3x on tanks.

key_matchups.counter_with: Fast attack aircraft (Su25/A10), light cavalry raid, or counter-battery AP fire
key_matchups.why: Artillery is medium-armored and slow. Air strikes suppress from outside its range; fast light forces raid before it can reposition. Counter-MLRS AP trades roughly even.

key_matchups.counter_with: Cruise Missile (UNRESISTABLE 1.5M DPS), MLRS/BM21 carpet (full EXPLOSION at 1x), F4G SEAD vs AA structures
key_matchups.why: Structure armor is weak to EXPLOSION (1x, not reduced); garrisons inherit infantry weaknesses. AP main guns are poor here (EXPLOSION transfers badly to tank-gun rounds). Cruise missile ignores all armor and is the reliable one-shot.

counters.notes: Universal damage rules: ARMOR_PIERCING = 0.9x vs tank armor (tank duels are near-mirrors decided by range/DPS); STEALTHJET_MISSILES = 5x-10x vs aircraft/heli armor; COMANCHE_VULCAN = 2x infantry / 3.1x Mi24 / 0.3x tanks (specialized AA+anti-inf); ATGM-TOW burst = 20x vs air-type armor (huge but short-lived); EXPLOSION = 1x but large AOE, ideal vs infantry clusters and structures; Cruise Missile = UNRESISTABLE, ignores all armor. Never use AP rounds against AA platforms or aircraft — use missile/explosive damage instead. Coverage gaps: the bot has no effectiveness data for plain CWCusM113/CWCusM163 (only the ChassisOne variants are modeled), F15_Patrol, all Fort/garrison templates (CWCusFortM2/Mortar/TOW, CWCruFortInf), and the SS20/Su24 superweapon-class units — it will mis-target or ignore these until they are added.
